text:
Once upon a time, there was a little mouse who loved honey more than anything else. Every morning, after waking up, she'd seek out the sweetest flowers and drink their sweet nectar. 

Once, there was a greedy bee who stole all the honeybees' honey. He wasn't clever, just terribly greedy!

One day, the little mouse caught the bee one by one, hiding each prize honeybee.

The bee couldn't sleep. Night after night, he'd dream about honey and honeycombs.

One day...

The bee woke up with a terrible headache.

"Where...?'

"I've stolen all your honey!

"Honey?" questioned the confused bee.

"Yes, that's mine. Where's yours?"

"The little mouse?"

"In her nest. Did you know?"

The bee flew there. The nest was made of softest hay, and nestled right next to a sweetly scented lavender bush.

Next to that nest was a bush with bird feathers woven into its leaves
